name: dns-annotate
description: Annotate-the-design-doc review loop for the design-and-ship skill. Vendored annotation SDK adapted from Lavish (kunchenguid/lavish-axi, MIT); thin local server, side panel, and CLI are original and match design-and-ship branding.
comment: Zero runtime dependencies on purpose: the server uses Node built-in http + fs.watch, so the loop runs with no install step.
